title: ErrorResponse
description: Standard error response returned by OSP provider endpoints when a request fails

error.description: Machine-readable error code from the OSP error taxonomy (e.g., 'invalid_request', 'rate_limit_exceeded', 'provider_error')

message.description: Human-readable error message providing additional context about the failure

resource_id.description: The resource ID associated with the error, if applicable

retry_after_seconds.description: Number of seconds the agent should wait before retrying. Present for rate_limit_exceeded, provider_unavailable, and other retryable errors

details.description: Additional error context with provider-specific details (e.g., invalid field names, validation errors, constraint violations)
